title: cyclosorus dissimulans
intro: Cyclosorus dissimulans, also known as the 'False Cinnamon Fern', is a species of fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus dissimulans include reducing inflammation, aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are commonly used in traditional remedies and folk medicine.
